title: Kitchen Perfected 2000w Double Hotplate / Cast Iron Hotplate / Variable Heat Setting / Overhead Protection / Corrosion Resistant / Non-slip Rubber Feet / Easy Clean Finish / E4203SS / Stainless Steel
seller_info_text: Sold by Amazon Resale and Fulfilled by Amazon.
availability_text: Only 12 left in stock (more on the way).
features: TWO CORROSION RESISTANT HOTPLATES: Two corrosion resistant 1000w cast iron hotplates measuring 155mm diameter with polished stainless steel surround, build for frequent use.

INDIVIDUAL VARIABLE TEMPERATURE CONTROL: The double cast iron hotplate has individual variable temperature dials with variable heat settings and a neon power indicator giving you control to cook at the perfect temperature every time.
OVERHEAT PROTECTION: Overheat protection and non-slip rubber feet for safe use and added peace of mind.
EASY CLEAN: Easy to clean, wipe down polished stainless steel surround and corrosion resistant hotplate.

SMALL, LIGHTWEIGHT AND PORTABLE: This is the deal product for small kitchens, student accommodation, camping trips, holiday homes, caravans, offices, bedsits or as an extra hotplate in the kitchen when cooking a large meal. Why not also use the hotplate as a food warmer prior to serving.
description: Limited kitchen space - Try the Kitchen Perfected 2000w Double Hotplate for size. The double cast iron hotplate has individual variable temperature dials with variable heat settings and a neon power indicator giving you complete control to cook at the perfect temperature every time. Also, why not use the hotplate as a food warmer prior to serving. That's two functions in one compact unit. Durable, corrosion resistant cast iron hotplate with stainless steel surround, built for frequent use with an easy to clean, wipe down finish. It has overheat protection and non-slip rubber feet for safe use and added peace of mind. The unit is small in size with two 1000w hotplates measuring 155mm diameter each. It's lightweight in construction and portable making it ideal for use as an extra cooking appliance in a small kitchen, student accommodation, camping trips, holiday homes, caravans, offices, bedsits or as an extra hotplate in the kitchen when cooking a large meal. Box Includes: Kitchen Perfected 2000w Double Hotplate 1 x Instruction Manual
